header: Run the whole site from the TYPO3 backend
subheadline: Four backend views, one install — compose, edit inline, theme, and override without a single line of code.

items.title: Pick from ten element groups
items.description: The new-content wizard organizes all 255 Desiderio elements into ten curated groups. Editors find the right hero, pricing table, or footer in seconds instead of scrolling a flat list.

image.title: Desiderio content wizard
image.alternative: TYPO3 new-content wizard listing all ten Desiderio element groups.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Edit inline in the Visual Editor
items.description: The Visual Editor renders the real page with the live theme and lets editors type straight into it. What they see while editing is exactly what visitors get — no preview round-trips, no surprises.

image.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
image.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor showing a Desiderio page being edited inline with live preview.
image.description: Screenshot of inline editing in the Visual Editor with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Restyle the site from settings
items.description: Theme preset, dark mode, density, radius, and fonts live in the site settings module. Switching presets repaints every element from OKLCH tokens — no rebuild, no deployment window.

image.title: Desiderio theme site settings
image.alternative: TYPO3 site settings showing the Desiderio theme category with preset and appearance options.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Theme a single subtree differently
items.description: A preset field in page properties overrides the site default and inherits down the rootline. Campaign pages, brand sections, or styleguide chapters each get their own look in one install.

image.title: Per-page theme preset field
image.alternative: TYPO3 page properties with the Desiderio theme preset selector.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
